title: rhododendron × manglesii
intro: Rhododendron × manglesii, also known as Mangles' rhododendron, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the rhododendron family, known for its vibrant pink flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits associated with Rhododendron × manglesii include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues, among other uses. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
